summary: Iteration 46: Backend PDF generation testing for Preventivo. Fixed 2 bugs in generate_preventivo_pdf function that caused crashes when fields had explicit None values. All 17 tests pass. PDF endpoint verified end-to-end.

pdf_generation_basic.complete_data: PASS - PDF generated with company/client/lines data
pdf_generation_basic.missing_company: PASS - No crash when company is None
pdf_generation_basic.missing_client: PASS - No crash when client is None
pdf_generation_basic.missing_both: PASS - No crash when both are None
pdf_generation_basic.empty_lines: PASS - No crash with empty lines array

pdf_content_validation.contains_totals: PASS - IVA breakdown and totals present
pdf_content_validation.contains_conditions_page: PASS - Conditions page generated when condizioni_vendita set

api_endpoint_test.pdf_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/preventivi/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF (14705 bytes, %PDF-1.7 header)

bugs_fixed.issue: payment_type_label, subject, riferimento could be explicitly None causing html.escape() to crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'or ""' to handle None values: prev.get('payment_type_label', '') or ''

bugs_fixed.issue: sconto_1, sconto_2, sconto_globale, line_total could be None causing float() to crash

seed_data_creation: Created session for bridge-test-user in user_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation for preventivi fully tested. WeasyPrint HTML/CSS implementation verified. Italian number formatting (_fmt_it helper) working correctly. All edge cases (None company, None client, empty lines, None field values) handled. Test session: test_pdf_session_11912698190a for bridge-test-user.
